hsrProperties.name: HSR0301-401 - Modern Smart 2BHK Aparthotel in HSR Layout
hsrProperties.description:
Welcome to Hodo Stays, located in the heart of HSR Layout, Bangalore. Our modern 2BHK apartments are perfect for both business and leisure travellers. 
Enjoy high-speed WiFi, TV, AC, a fully equipped kitchen, and daily housekeeping. 
Relax in our rooftop community area, with concierge and caretaker services available. 
With ground-level parking, lift access, and proximity to tech hubs, Hodo Stays offers the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and urban living.

Hodo stays is a premium apartment building in the vibrant HSR Layout, Bangalore, offering a range of modern 2BHK and 3BHK units, including a luxurious penthouse. Spread across six floors, our property is designed for both comfort and convenience.
hsrProperties.accessDescription:
Guests have full access to their private 2BHK apartment, including the kitchen, living room, bedrooms, bathrooms, and utility area. 
You are also welcome to use the rooftop community area, where you can relax and enjoy the views or socialize with other guests. 
Ground-level parking is available for your convenience. The lift provides easy access to all floors of the building.
hsrProperties.interactionDescription:
Our friendly caretaker is on-site and available to assist with any immediate needs or requests during your stay. 
We also offer concierge service to help with local recommendations, transportation, and any other queries you may have. Should you need further assistance, we are always just a phone call or message away to ensure your stay is as comfortable as possible.
hsrProperties.spaceDescription:
Each apartment includes well-furnished bedrooms, a cozy living area with a TV and WiFi, a fully equipped kitchen with a gas stove, a oven, a refrigerator,  a washing machine, and essential toiletries. You'll also find premium bed linens and bath towels provided. 

The building features ground-level parking, a lift for easy access to all floors, and a community area on the terrace where guests can relax and enjoy the views. Guests also enjoy services like daily housekeeping, a concierge, and a caretaker.  

Hodo stays combines the ease of urban living with exceptional hospitality, making it ideal for both short and long-term stays. Every detail is designed to provide a comfortable and memorable stay.

hsrProperties.name: HSR0301-201 - Cozy 2BHK Aparthotel with Fast WiFi in HSR Layout
hsrProperties.description:

hsrProperties.name: HSR0301-501 - Luxury Cozy 3BHK with Courtyard in HSR Layout
hsrProperties.description:
Welcome to our spacious 3BHK apartment, located in  HSR Layout, Bangalore. 
This elegant apartment features three well-appointed bedrooms, a cozy living area, and a private balcony to enjoy fresh air and city views. 
With high-speed WiFi, a fully equipped kitchen, and modern amenities like TV, AC, and a washing machine, this apartment is perfect for both business and leisure travelers. 
Enjoy daily housekeeping, concierge service, and easy access to local tech hubs, restaurants, and shopping.

Hodo stays is a premium apartment building in the vibrant HSR Layout, Bangalore, offering a range of modern 2BHK and 3BHK units, including a luxurious penthouse. Spread across six floors, our property is designed for both comfort and convenience.

Hodo stays combines the ease of urban living with exceptional hospitality, making it ideal for both short and long-term stays. Every detail is designed to provide a comfortable and memorable stay.

Guests have full access to the 3BHK apartment, including three bedrooms, the living area, a fully equipped kitchen, and bathrooms. 
You’ll also enjoy the private balcony, perfect for relaxing or taking in the views. 
In addition, guests can use the building’s rooftop community area, ground-level parking, and the lift for easy access. 
Daily housekeeping and concierge services are available to make your stay comfortable.

jpnProperties.name: JPN0701-101
jpnProperties.description:
Hodo: Sol is a professionally managed 2BHK aparthotel in JP Nagar, designed for travellers who value space, calm, and reliability. Whether you're here for work, family, or medical visits, you'll find a clean, thoughtfully designed apartment with everything you need for a comfortable extended stay.
This is not a homestay. It's a modern serviced apartment with consistent hospitality standards.

The Space
A bright, well-planned two-bedroom apartment with a living room, fully equipped kitchen, and dedicated workspace. The interiors are minimal and calming. Clean lines, quality furnishings, and plenty of natural light.
Both bedrooms are spacious and private. The kitchen comes with essentials for self-catering. The living area is designed to double as a work or relaxation zone.
Everything is maintained to aparthotel standards: fresh linens, regular housekeeping, and prompt service.

Location
Located in a quiet pocket of JP Nagar, near MS Ramaiah City Layout. You're close to hospitals, offices, and local conveniences, but far enough from the noise.
Easy access to major business districts and transport links. Restaurants, pharmacies, and supermarkets are a short drive away.

Who This Is For
Corporate professionals on assignment or project work
Families visiting for medical care or relocation
Long-stay guests who need a functional, comfortable base
Anyone looking for the reliability of a serviced apartment without hotel formality

Why Hodo
Hodo operates aparthotels, not homestays. That means professional management, consistent quality, and service you can count on. We design our spaces for real stays, not just photos.
Sol is part of our JP Nagar collection. Calm, capable, and ready when you are.

House Rules:
No smoking indoors
Suitable for infants and children
Quiet hours after 10 PM

You'll have private access to the entire 2BHK apartment for the duration of your stay.
Entry: Self check-in with a digital lock code or key handover at reception, depending on your arrival time. Instructions will be shared before arrival.
Common areas: You're welcome to use the parking area, lift, and building entrance. These are shared spaces with security cameras for your safety.
On-site support: Our reception team is available during business hours for any assistance. For urgent requests outside these hours, we're reachable by phone.
The apartment is yours to use as your own—cook, work, relax. We'll only enter for scheduled housekeeping or maintenance, with your prior consent.

jpnProperties.name: JPN0701-401
jpnProperties.description:
Welcome to a modern, fully serviced 2BHK aparthotel in Arekere, JP Nagar, designed for guests who value space, comfort, and reliability. Whether you're visiting Bangalore for work, medical appointments, relocation, or an extended stay, this home blends apartment-style living with hotel-level service.

Located in a calm residential pocket near Arekere, the property offers excellent connectivity while maintaining a quiet, private atmosphere.

jpnProperties.name: JPN0701-301
jpnProperties.description:
Welcome to your Hodo home in JP Nagar 7th Phase. This modern 2BHK apartment is perfect for families, professionals, or extended stays in Bangalore.
Enjoy two comfortable bedrooms, a fully equipped kitchen, and a bright living area. Professionally managed with high-speed WiFi, fresh linens, and 24/7 support. Lift access to 4th floor with one flight of stairs to reach the apartment.
Located in peaceful JP Nagar with restaurants, cafes, and supermarkets nearby. Ideal for both work and relaxation.

About This Space:
Experience modern comfort in this penthouse studio at JP Nagar 7th Phase, thoughtfully designed for business travelers, medical visitors, and extended stays in South Bangalore. Featuring a fully private terrace, dedicated workspace, and complete kitchen, this studio combines the independence of an apartment with the reliability of professional aparthotel management.
Strategically located near major hospitals, institutions, and business hubs, it's an ideal base for both short visits and longer stays.

The Space:
Spacious 2BHK with excellent natural light
Fully equipped kitchen for home cooking
Dedicated workspace with high-speed WiFi
Air-conditioning for year-round comfort
Modern bathroom with quality amenities
Ample storage for extended stays

Designed for guests who value independence, comfort, and tranquility.

Why Guests Choose This Stay:
Peaceful residential setting in well-connected JP Nagar 7th Phase
Perfect for remote work and medical stay requirements
Professionally managed under the trusted Hodo brand
Reliable housekeeping and responsive on-ground support

The Neighborhood:
Conveniently located with easy access to:
Fortis Hospital and Apollo Hospital
Indian Institute of Management Bangalore (IIMB)
WeWork and business centers
Bannerghatta Road
Indian Music Experience Museum

The property is surrounded by cafes, supermarkets, and daily conveniences while nestled in a quiet residential area that ensures restful nights.

Perfect For:
Medical visitors and caregivers needing nearby hospital access
Solo business travelers and remote workers
Professionals relocating to Bangalore
Couples seeking privacy and modern amenities
Anyone requiring a comfortable long-term base in South Bangalore

You'll have complete private access to the entire 2BHK apartment throughout your stay. The building entrance is secured, and you'll receive check-in instructions with access details prior to arrival.

You will also have access to:
• Common building entrance and lobby areas
• Common terrace (5th floor)
• Designated parking (subject to availability)

Please note: The building has lift access up to the 4th floor.  Our team is available to assist with luggage if needed.

Our on-ground support team is reachable 24/7 for any assistance, questions, or requests during your stay. While we respect your privacy, we're always just a call away when you need us.

• This is a professionally managed aparthotel under the Hodo brand. Valid government ID is required at check-in as per local regulations.
• The penthouse studio is located on the 5th floor. Lift access is available up to the 4th floor, and guests will need to use one flight of stairs to reach the studio.
• The terrace is fully private but we request guests to use it responsibly, especially during late hours, as this is a residential neighbourhood.
• Quiet hours are observed to respect neighbours.
• Housekeeping is provided based on booking duration. Additional cleaning can be arranged upon request.
• The kitchen is equipped for regular cooking; guests are requested to leave it in a reasonable condition.
• Early check-in and late check-out are subject to availability.
